headline: Industrial Workplace Accident Injury Preparation Checklist — St. George
articleBody:
Industrial Workplace Accident Injury Preparation Checklist for St. George Clients

Before your Industrial Workplace Accident Injury appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
